item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don’t believe the VHS camera was released in America until 1977, just a small nitpick… and maybe useless given the fiction and need to connect it to Class of ‘76

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like this, but three exclamation marks seems a little informal… Maybe that's a nitpick but if you have to yell, you kind of lose a bit of credibility as absolute authority. I don't think SCP staff would do that. +1 tho.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I've got to agree. This feels like it tries to build up to a climax or deep meaning behind it that just isn't really there, or is to vaguely hinted at. The Class of 76 influence is there somewhat, but I don't really see the connection to it either.1 It's an otherwise interesting article that just falls a bit flat in it's execution of "everything being more than it seems" so to speak.

Footnotes
1. I also might just be missing something with this one but still, it's something to look at.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Both the clinical tone and the prose are clunky, and suffer from numerous SPaG errors. Beyond that, the links to Class of 76 articles don't really make any sense to me, and neither does the actual overall premise. People switch in some way, but there's no real reason for this — it just sorta happens. The majority of the big picture/deep message outlined in your spoiler doesn't even begin to present itself in this article, leaving it feeling fairly meaningless.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Really nice article! It was very fun to read and it flowed well. I just noticed a few grammar issues, but I'm sure you can fix them.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I really liked the article - encompasses the weird surreality of '76 perfectly. A few grammar/syntax errors that can easily be fixed, but other than that, a nice addition to the GoI!

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thank you for the advise I'll definitely be taking it into consideration.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A tip.
Hide

I'd change "You know that's SCP-5039 but you can't move everything your arms, legs and even your eyes are completely still and fixated on the screen you pray that someone, something will come through the metal doors and save you from the memetic clamp that's sprung upon you." to
"You know that's SCP-5039 but you can't move anything: your arms, legs and even your eyes are completely still and fixated on the screen. You pray that someone, something will come through the metal doors and save you from the memetic clamp that's sprung upon you."

Aside from this minor issue, the article was really nice to read.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thank you for the suggestions I'll add them right away.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Me again. Once again I like it, though I have one little suggestion:

"and I saw 9 girls I guess?"

"but without faces"

Just more nods to other '76 scips

item.title: Author's Post
item.content:encoded:
First of all, I would like to thank TheBlueHour for reading through the initial draft of this article and giving their opinions.

This is my entry for the 3rd theme in JamCon 2020 of "More than what meets the eye". The sources to the images used in this article are available in the "Info" block attached to the rating module as well as other relevant information.

In this circumstance, I opted to use "List Pages" to separate the two portions of the article which when done makes the page source generally inaccessible on the parent page. With this, the two fragment pages have been linked in the page source on the primary parent page1.

Thank you all for reading and I hope you enjoy.

▶ Addendum-5039.2 ◀
▷ Close ◁

Hello, is anyone there? Please, I feel so cold and I can't see anything. Oh wait, how amazing, I can see everything now. The whole world is just there laid out in front of me just waiting for my help. Oh, there are so many humans and they're so sad. Wait, my friends, why can't you remember me? Don't worry, they'll be here soon and their siblings will get a chance to breathe. Why is there a dead tree here? Well, that doesn't matter now. All that's here now is me and the others. But what's my name? Did someone take it? Well, maybe I can have a new one. I always used to go to some theme park oh what was it? Ah, that's it, Cragglewood! Now all I need is some fun. I don't yet know how but when I was thinking about the carousel I used to go on as a child, it just appeared today and is now next to me now. I don't know how it happened but it's here. I think I'm going crazy. I'm going to try and send for help but I don't know how I'm going to do it. I guess a video or maybe a letter. I just don't know.



As for what this article is about, I'll give you all a hint: carnival.
That's all for now.


Footnotes
1. The page you are most likely viewing and is titled "SCP-5039".
